title: PHAC Regulatory Openness and Transparency Framework Action Plan - Canada.ca
content:
## PHAC Regulatory Openness and Transparency Framework Action Plan
Continue development and posting of Regulatory Policy Statements
- Continue development and posting of Regulatory Policy Statements
Human Pathogens and Toxins Act/Regulations
Continue development and posting of guidance documents, training materials, Pathogen Safety Data Sheets, and other supporting materials to promote compliance
- Continue development and posting of guidance documents, training materials, Pathogen Safety Data Sheets, and other supporting materials to promote compliance
Human Pathogens and Toxins Act/Regulations
Publish incident notification reports of significant public health risks identified during inspections of conveyance, flight kitchens or food caterers
- Publish incident notification reports of significant public health risks identified during inspections of conveyance, flight kitchens or food caterers
Potable Water Regulations & Food and Drugs Act
Publish recommendations of the Advisory Committee on Human Pathogens and Toxins
- Publish recommendations of the Advisory Committee on Human Pathogens and Toxins
Human Pathogens and Toxins Act/Regulations
Publish PHAC Compliance and Enforcement Framework
- Publish PHAC Compliance and Enforcement Framework
Human Pathogens and Toxins Act/Regulations
Post a subscription webpage - for communiqués sign-up (e.g., Newsletters, eBlasts)
- Post a subscription webpage - for communiqués sign-up (e.g., Newsletters, eBlasts)
Human Pathogens and Toxins Act/Regulations
Develop and post web links to Health Portfolio and OGD partners related content (e.g. HC - Framework, CFIA - Transparency, PS – Safeguarding Science)
- Develop and post web links to Health Portfolio and OGD partners related content (e.g. HC - Framework, CFIA - Transparency, PS – Safeguarding Science)
Update web page: Quarantine Program (outlines general description of the Program and provides contact information)
- Update web page: Quarantine Program (outlines general description of the Program and provides contact information)
Update web page: Travelling Public Program Risk-Based Approach to Program Delivery
- Update web page: Travelling Public Program Risk-Based Approach to Program Delivery
Potable Water Regulations & Food and Drugs Act
Revise PHAC Regulatory Webpages for plain language and consistent messaging (linked to TBS Regulatory Reform Initiatives, Web-Renewal and Canada.ca Migration)
- Revise PHAC Regulatory Webpages for plain language and consistent messaging (linked to TBS Regulatory Reform Initiatives, Web-Renewal and Canada.ca Migration)
Develop and publish program level Compliance and Enforcement Policy
- Develop and publish program level Compliance and Enforcement Policy
Quarantine Act & Food and Drugs Act
Develop and publish technical food safety inspection guidelines for regulated conveyance and ancillary service sector (e.g. cruise ship, passenger trains, passenger ferries, flight kitchens, food caterers)
- Develop and publish technical food safety inspection guidelines for regulated conveyance and ancillary service sector (e.g. cruise ship, passenger trains, passenger ferries, flight kitchens, food caterers)
Develop and publish technical inspection guidelines for potable water inspection for each regulated conveyance sector (e.g. cruise ship, passenger trains and passenger ferries)
- Develop and publish technical inspection guidelines for potable water inspection for each regulated conveyance sector (e.g. cruise ship, passenger trains and passenger ferries)
Potable Water Regulations
Develop and publish the Biological Agents List - a list of approximately 10,000 human pathogens, classified by Risk Group.
- Develop and publish the Biological Agents List - a list of approximately 10,000 human pathogens, classified by Risk Group.
Human Pathogens and Toxins Act/Regulations
Develop and publish the Pathogen Risk Assessment Methodology
- Develop and publish the Pathogen Risk Assessment Methodology
Human Pathogens and Toxins Act/Regulations
Develop and publish guidance on Importation of Cadavers, Body Parts and Human Remains
- Develop and publish guidance on Importation of Cadavers, Body Parts and Human Remains
Develop and publish Annual Report on HPTA/R Activity
- Develop and publish Annual Report on HPTA/R Activity
Human Pathogens and Toxins Act/Regulations
Consult, develop and publish information about inspections
- Consult, develop and publish information about inspections
Human Pathogens and Toxins Act/Regulations & Health of Animal Act/Regulations
Develop and publish components of incident notification reports
- Develop and publish components of incident notification reports
Human Pathogens and Toxins Act/Regulations & Health of Animal Act/Regulations
Develop and publish traveller health assessment statistics
- Develop and publish traveller health assessment statistics
*All: includes Food and Drugs Act, Human Pathogens and Toxins Act/Regulations, Health of Animals Act/Regulations, Quarantine Act and Potable Water Regulations
